HERO.DESCRIPTION_P3: — I design, build, and ship complete web products. Fast, clean, and ready for real users from day one.

TRUST.TITLE: Trusted by teams building at scale
TRUST.LABEL: Shipped for

SERVICES.LABEL: WHAT I DO
SERVICES.TITLE: Three ways to work together
SERVICES.SERVICE1_DESC: You have an idea and need a complete product built from scratch — fast, clean, and ready for real users. I handle architecture, backend, frontend, and deployment end-to-end.
SERVICES.SERVICE2_DESC: You have a team and need a senior contractor who contributes from day one — no ramp-up, no hand-holding. I plug in, write clean code, and ship with your team.
SERVICES.SERVICE3_DESC: You have a brief and want someone to take full ownership. I scope it, hire talent if needed, lead delivery, and hand over a complete production-ready system with documentation.

PROCESS.LABEL: HOW I WORK
PROCESS.TITLE: Proven process for shipping clean code
PROCESS.SUBTITLE: A clear, repeatable process that keeps you informed and in control at every stage.
PROCESS.STEP1_DESC: We discuss goals, constraints, and users. I ask the hard questions so nothing is assumed before we start.
PROCESS.STEP2_DESC: I design the system — data models, API contracts, tech choices — before writing a single line of code.
PROCESS.STEP3_DESC: Iterative development with regular check-ins. Clean code, tests included, documented as we go.
PROCESS.STEP4_DESC: Deployed, monitored, and handed over with docs. You own everything — code, infra, pipeline.

PROJECTS.TITLE: Featured projects
PROJECTS.SUBTITLE: Four products. Four different problems solved.
PROJECTS.SUBTITLE2: Click any project to see what was built and why it mattered.
PROJECTS.PROJECT1_NAME: Recruitment SaaS that evaluates candidates at scale
PROJECTS.PROJECT1_OUTCOME: Qodexia — secure test-taking, billing, CI/CD pipeline, Grafana monitoring
PROJECTS.PROJECT1_DESC: Recruitment teams were drowning in unstructured interviews with no measurable output. I built a complete SaaS platform handling technical and behavioral evaluations, subscription billing, a secure proctored test engine, and a full Jenkins → SonarQube → Docker → Grafana pipeline so the team could ship weekly without breaking production.
PROJECTS.PROJECT2_NAME: IoT waste management system for the city of Riyadh
PROJECTS.PROJECT2_DESC: Backend engineering for three Saudi government clients under strict compliance and security requirements. Built an IoT waste tracking platform integrated with ThingsBoard for real-time sensor data, plus a ZATCA-compliant application managing import/export operations and regulatory reporting.
PROJECTS.PROJECT3_NAME: Real-time platform for students managing study-abroad journeys
PROJECTS.PROJECT3_OUTCOME: DNDServ — video calls, WebSocket chat, AI autocomplete, ElasticSearch
PROJECTS.PROJECT3_DESC: Students managing international programs had fragmented communication and zero real-time visibility. I built real-time video calling, WebSocket instant messaging with AI-powered autocomplete suggestions, appointment management, and ElasticSearch-powered full-text search across the entire platform.
PROJECTS.PROJECT4_NAME: Complete telemedicine app — solo delivery in 6 months
PROJECTS.PROJECT4_OUTCOME: Freelance — digital prescriptions, patient records, QR signature
PROJECTS.PROJECT4_DESC: Solo delivery of a full telemedicine platform in 6 months — from auth system to patient records, radiology reports, lab analyses, appointment scheduling, and legally-compliant electronic prescriptions signed with QR code digital signatures.

EXPERIENCE.TITLE: Experience
EXPERIENCE.SUBTITLE: Real experience, real systems
EXPERIENCE.EXP1_DESC: Developed and maintained Necleus, an enterprise ecosystem of web applications used by major public-sector organizations across Saudi Arabia. The platform supports waste management, fleet management, contracting, landfill operations, planning, and real-time monitoring, integrating IoT data through ThingsBoard to provide operational visibility and analytics. Responsibilities Designed, developed, and maintained full-stack features using Java, Spring Boot, Angular, and PostgreSQL. Built and enhanced RESTful APIs and responsive user interfaces for multiple business modules. Integrated ThingsBoard telemetry into the platform to deliver real-time monitoring and operational insights. Collaborated with cross-functional teams in an Agile environment to deliver high-quality enterprise software. Participated in code reviews, bug fixing, performance tuning, and continuous application improvements. Key Achievements Optimized the platform real-time monitoring map, improving the performance and responsiveness of live vehicle and asset tracking across multiple business domains. Reduced the Angular application build time by approximately 50%, significantly improving development workflow and CI/CD efficiency. Contributed to the implementation of a scalable real-time architecture using WebSockets, Redis, Kafka, and PostgreSQL to process and distribute live telemetry data. Delivered features supporting critical operations for Riyadh Municipality, ZATCA, SIRC, and multiple Saudi government ministries. Contributed to the continuous evolution of a large-scale enterprise platform composed of multiple interconnected applications.
EXPERIENCE.EXP1_BULLET1: Optimized the platform real-time monitoring map, improving the performance and responsiveness of live vehicle and asset tracking across multiple business domains.
EXPERIENCE.EXP1_BULLET2: Reduced the Angular application build time by approximately 50%, significantly improving development workflow and CI/CD efficiency.

EXPERIENCE.EXP1_BULLET4: Delivered features supporting critical operations for Riyadh Municipality, ZATCA, SIRC, and multiple Saudi government ministries.
EXPERIENCE.EXP1_BULLET5: Contributed to the continuous evolution of a large-scale enterprise platform composed of multiple interconnected applications.
EXPERIENCE.EXP2_DESC: Contributed to the development of Evaliqo, an AI-powered SaaS recruitment platform that helps organizations streamline hiring through intelligent candidate sourcing, skills assessments, AI matching, and applicant tracking. The platform automates recruitment workflows while providing recruiters with powerful evaluation and decision-making tools. Responsibilities Developed full-stack features using Java, Spring Boot, Angular, and PostgreSQL. Designed and implemented secure REST APIs and responsive user interfaces. Integrated Keycloak to provide secure authentication, authorization, role-based access control (RBAC), and identity management. Built and enhanced recruitment workflows, candidate management, and evaluation modules. Integrated AI-powered services to improve candidate qualification and matching. Optimized application performance, security, and scalability. Collaborated with cross-functional teams in an Agile/Scrum environment to deliver high-quality software. Key Achievements Contributed to the development of an AI-powered recruitment platform, improving hiring and candidate evaluation workflows. Implemented secure authentication and authorization using Keycloak, enabling centralized identity management and fine-grained access control. Developed scalable backend services and responsive Angular interfaces for a cloud-based SaaS application. Enhanced application performance and user experience through frontend and backend optimizations. Contributed to the continuous evolution of a secure, scalable, and maintainable enterprise recruitment platform.
EXPERIENCE.EXP2_BULLET1: Contributed to the development of an AI-powered recruitment platform, improving hiring and candidate evaluation workflows.
EXPERIENCE.EXP2_BULLET2: Implemented secure authentication and authorization using Keycloak, enabling centralized identity management and fine-grained access control.
EXPERIENCE.EXP2_BULLET3: Developed scalable backend services and responsive Angular interfaces for a cloud-based SaaS application.
EXPERIENCE.EXP2_BULLET4: Enhanced application performance and user experience through frontend and backend optimizations.
EXPERIENCE.EXP2_BULLET5: Contributed to the continuous evolution of a secure, scalable, and maintainable enterprise recruitment platform.
EXPERIENCE.EXP3_DESC: Contributed to the development of ESP-Mob, an international mobility platform that digitalizes and centralizes the entire mobility lifecycle for universities, students, and partner institutions. The platform streamlines the full process — from university partnerships and mobility opportunities to candidate applications, evaluations, interviews, and online payments — within a unified ecosystem. Beyond my technical role, I actively participated in product evolution by proposing features and improving business workflows based on real user and institutional needs, helping shape the platform into a complete end-to-end solution for international mobility management. Key Achievements Helped design and develop a platform that centralizes the entire international mobility process for universities and partner organizations. Contributed to product evolution by proposing business features and workflow improvements in collaboration with stakeholders. Built and maintained modules for university partnerships, enabling institutions to manage international collaboration programs. Developed features for publishing and managing mobility opportunities for students and candidates. Implemented the full candidate application lifecycle, including submission, document handling, and processing workflows. Developed evaluation and selection systems used to assess and rank candidates. Integrated real-time video interview capabilities to support remote candidate assessments. Implemented online payment workflows to support administrative and program-related transactions. Ensured secure access control using Keycloak (SSO, RBAC, authentication and authorization). Contributed to building a scalable and maintainable architecture following modern software engineering practices.

EXPERIENCE.EXP4_DESC: Contributed to the development of TEL-MED, a digital healthcare platform designed to transform and democratize access to medical services in Tunisia. The platform enables patients — especially in rural and underserved regions — to access remote medical consultations, reducing the need for physical travel and improving access to specialists. Beyond technical development, I contributed to shaping the product vision by proposing features aimed at improving healthcare accessibility, communication between doctors and patients, and overall system usability. Key Achievements Contributed to the development of a platform that digitizes healthcare services in Tunisia, improving access to medical care for patients in rural and underserved areas. Developed and managed doctor account systems, enabling structured onboarding and administration of healthcare professionals. Built a secure internal chat system to facilitate communication between patients and doctors. Implemented remote appointment booking workflows, allowing patients to consult doctors from anywhere. Supported remote consultation capabilities, enabling patients to access specialists without physical travel. Developed digital prescription features, allowing doctors to issue prescriptions electronically after consultations. Contributed to product thinking by proposing features focused on improving healthcare accessibility and operational efficiency. Ensured secure handling of sensitive medical data with proper authentication and role-based access control.
